name: Wahiawa Botanical Garden
tagline: A free 27-acre tropical jewel in Central Oahu — lush ravine walks through native ferns and palms that feel primordial.
bestTime: Mornings for the coolest temperatures and best light
talkStory: A free 27-acre botanical garden in Central Oahu along a deep ravine, featuring native Hawaiian plants, tropical ferns, and a palm garden that feels primordial. Far from any tourist path, the cool, shaded ravine walk feels like entering a different world. Locals come here for quiet walks and photography. Free admission, open daily.
